name: Powdery Mildew
symptoms: White powdery patches on leaf surface
Yellowing and curling of older leaves
Reduced fruit set
causes: High humidity at night with cool temperatures
Wet leaf surfaces for extended periods
prevention: Run a circulation fan during night hours
Avoid wetting leaves when topping up reservoirs
treatment: Spray potassium bicarbonate (5g/L) every 5 days
Apply diluted milk spray (1:9 with water) weekly
Remove and destroy heavily infected leaves

name: Spider Mites
symptoms: Tiny yellow stippling on upper leaf surface
Fine webbing under leaves
Bronzing and leaf drop in heavy infestations
prevention: Hose down foliage weekly to dislodge mites
Inspect new plants in quarantine before adding to mainline
treatment: Release predatory mite Phytoseiulus persimilis
Spray neem oil (5ml/L) at dusk every 5 days for 3 cycles
Insecticidal soap targeting leaf undersides
source: IPM-CRSP, Real Solutions PH field notes

name: Aphids
symptoms: Clusters of green, black, or grey insects on new growth
Sticky honeydew on leaves
Distorted and curled new shoots
causes: Excess nitrogen feeding lush soft growth
Lack of natural predators in indoor systems
treatment: Release ladybugs or lacewing larvae
Spray insecticidal soap on infested clusters
Strong water spray to dislodge colonies (lettuce only)

name: Pythium Root Rot
symptoms: Brown slimy roots instead of healthy white
Sudden wilting in midday despite full reservoir
Stunted growth and yellow lower leaves
prevention: Chill reservoir to <22C with shade or water chiller
Add air stones and adequate aeration
Sanitize channels with 1% H2O2 between batches
treatment: Add 35% hydrogen peroxide at 1ml/L weekly
Trim affected roots, transplant to clean channel
Inoculate with Trichoderma harzianum biocontrol

name: Calcium Deficiency (Tip Burn / BER)
symptoms: Brown crispy tips on young leaves (tip burn)
Sunken black spot at fruit base (blossom-end rot)
Stunted new growth
causes: EC too high blocking Ca uptake
prevention: Cap EC per crop stage chart
Add Cal-Mag supplement weekly during fruiting
treatment: Spray 0.5% calcium nitrate foliar at dusk
Lower EC by 0.3 and add Cal-Mag
Improve airflow with circulation fans

name: Whitefly
symptoms: Tiny white moth-like insects fly up when leaves disturbed
Yellow stippling and sticky honeydew on leaves
Sooty mold on lower foliage
treatment: Release Encarsia formosa parasitic wasp
Insecticidal soap or neem oil at 5-day intervals
Vacuum adults early morning when sluggish

name: Fusarium Wilt
symptoms: Sudden one-sided wilting of leaves
Brown vascular streaks inside stems
Plant collapses within days
prevention: Use new sterile media per batch
treatment: Remove and destroy infected plants immediately
Sanitize entire system with 1% bleach then rinse 3x
Inoculate clean system with Trichoderma
